karen_arrives.text: Karen is in the driveway. Arms crossed. The posture that ends marriages.
karen_arrives.speaker: Karen

karen_speaks.speaker: Karen
karen_speaks.text: "Where have you BEEN? I've been texting you for hours. You smell like... what is that? Is that BEER?"

explain.speaker: Dave
explain.text: "I was at Doug's. We were just talking. I lost track of time. The lawn's mostly done. The grill's... I'm handling it."

hug.text: You wrap your arms around her. She's stiff at first. Then slightly less stiff. "You still smell like beer." But she doesn't pull away.

mumble.speaker: Dave
mumble.text: "I was... the thing is... Doug had this..." You trail off. She's already walking back inside.

karen_reacts.speaker: Karen
karen_reacts.text: "Doug. Of course it's Doug. My mother is here in an HOUR. Get it together."

karen_softens.speaker: Karen
karen_softens.text: "Just... finish the lawn. And shower. Please shower."
